annotations.label: Polar form produces standard normal deviates

anchor.snippet: Just as the basic form produces two standard normal deviates, so does this alternate calculation
It discards 1 − π /4 ≈ 21.46% of the total input uniformly distributed random number pairs generated
The basic form requires two multiplications, 1/2 logarithm , 1/2 square root , and one trigonometric function for each normal variate
The polar form requires 3/2 multiplications, 1/2 logarithm, 1/2 square root, and 1/2 division for each normal variate
This means that the algorithm will not produce random variables more than 6.660 standard deviations from the mean
